creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This line:
> @sample etc/newsyslog.conf.d/zrepl.conf.sample
is certainly wrong, because all files in etc/newsyslog.conf.d/ are executed. 

Sample should be under %%ETCDIR%%, something like
> @sample %%ETCDIR%%/newsyslog.conf.sample etc/newsyslog.conf.d/%%PORTNAME%%.conf

> @sample etc/syslog.d/zrepl.conf.sample
likely suffers from the same problem.
